mapper.sql: c.challenge_id AS challengeId, c.title AS title, c.description AS description, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, DATEDIFF(c.end_date, CURDATE()) AS dDay, COUNT(DISTINCT cp.participant_id) AS participantCount, b.badge_id AS badgeId, b.name AS badgeName, b.icon_url AS badgeIconUrl, MAX(CASE WHEN mp.member_id = #{viewerId} THEN mp.progress END) AS myProgress

FROM challenge c JOIN badge b ON b.badge_id = c.badge_id LEFT JOIN challenge_participant cp ON cp.challenge_id = c.challenge_id LEFT JOIN challenge_participant mp ON mp.challenge_id = c.challenge_id AND mp.member_id = #{viewerId}
GROUP BY c.challenge_id, c.title, c.description, c.start_date, c.end_date, b.badge_id, b.name, b.icon_url
mapper.select:
SELECT
AND CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date
AND c.end_date < CURDATE()
ORDER BY c.start_date DESC, c.challenge_id DESC
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM challenge WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM challenge_participant WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE challenge_participant SET progress = #{progress}, is_achieved = CASE WHEN #{progress} >= 100 THEN 1 ELSE is_achieved END, achieved_at = CASE WHEN #{progress} >= 100 AND achieved_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE achieved_at END WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT badge_id FROM challenge WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO member_badge (member_id, badge_id) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{badgeId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cp.member_id) FROM challenge_participant cp JOIN challenge c ON c.challenge_id = cp.challenge_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date
